headline: How Box (BOX) AI Tools And Buybacks Are Shaping The Evolving Investment Narrative
summary: Box’s updated analyst narrative keeps the model fair value steady at US$32.25, signaling that the central price target is unchanged in the latest run of assumptions. With no additional analyst commentary attached to this move, the focus stays squarely on how the numbers in the model are being fine tuned rather than on a new qualitative story. Read on to see how to track shifts like this over time and what to watch for as the Box thesis evolves. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Box shifts by...
